title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Orochi, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Beast Pirates, Luffy as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When we arrived at punk hazard... Caesar, another one of Kaido's Pawns, was there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was "dismanted" by law-dono, who is now our ally... it was truly a desperate situation....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that is where I met all of you....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Who is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: hey, this thing can talk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oh, is it not to your liking?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I love it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thinking back on it, we went through crisis after crisis. But it was absolutely a blessing to meet all of you.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: ...even though Orochi's troops know our names...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are saved by the fact that they do not truly believe of our presence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They think that we are ghosts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks to that, we haven't been put on any wanted posters,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and have been able to reenter the country without anyone suspect- ing a thing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even I didn't realize it, and I'm one of your allies....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Sorry, that was my fault....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey!! Stop Flirt- Ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The most important part of this plan is to not be exposed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: OK, got it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... our current forces are: The straw hat crew led by Luffy-Dono, the heart pirates led by law-dono.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And two groups from the milk tribe. The musketeers led by Inuarashi, and the guardians led by Nekoma- mushi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...as well as the Samurai we have re- cruited with the will to rebel...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ideally, our forces would need to be 5000 strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...However, Wagging a war is not our intention.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our goal is to gather information in complete secrecy and take the Commander's head!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The plan will commence in two weeks' time!! On the night of the fire festival...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We will commence the raid on Onigashima...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: T/N: ODA's Word Choice for "Raid" Could possibly be in/oking the 47? Roman assassination incident.

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: where Kaido resides.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 28 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
